The **China national under-17 football team**, also known as the **China Junior Team** (国少队), represents the [People's Republic of China](/wiki/China "China") in international [football](/wiki/Association_football "Association football") competitions in the [FIFA U-17 World Cup](/wiki/FIFA_U-17_World_Cup "FIFA U-17 World Cup") and the [AFC U-17 Asian Cup](/wiki/AFC_U-17_Asian_Cup "AFC U-17 Asian Cup"), as well as any other under-17 international football tournaments. It is governed by the [Football Association of the People's Republic of China](/wiki/Chinese_Football_Association "Chinese Football Association").
